series_metadata.series_description: File contains incomplete applications which may include the application, test results, correspondence, proof of liability insurance, litigation and other support documents required for those individuals and companies to apply for licensure or certification. License/certification application types include exhibitors, hotel/motels, underground storage tank (UST) installers, UST inspectors, reduced ignition propensity cigarettes (RIPC), storage of explosives, and fire protection equipment certification.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area for one year, then destroy. If litigation has been instituted, records for that applicant will be converted to machine readable format. Upon confirmation that machine readable format has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy paper copy. ; Electronic: Maintain records one year after date of application, unless litigation has been instituted. If litigation has been instituted, records for that applicant will be maintained for fifteen (15) years after the date the litigation terminates, then erase., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
